<div class="section-outer section-purple">
 <div class="section-header">
  <span class="section-header-text">In this section, we will discuss how to engineer your own agentic harness.</span>
 </div>
 <div class="section-grid section-grid-3">
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="boxes"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Components of a Harness</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="award"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Successful Harness Practices</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="hammer"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Design Your Own Harness</div>
  </div>
 </div>
</div>
